Lord of the Sea Crossbow

Attacks have a 25% chance of stunning the enemy for 3 sec and deal 45000 damage over 3 sec. If the enemy is killed during that period, summons a minion that stuns the enemy for a short time with each hit.

Requirements: 98-100
